title: Crypto bro who donated to Trump: This is 'most certainly not what I voted for'
description: The conduct and consequences of the war on Iran have prompted many loyalists of President Donald Trump to question or even withdraw their support, but his post on Tuesday was the last straw for some of his remaining backers. "A whole civilization will die tonight, never to be brought back again,” Trump posted. “I don’t want that to ⁠happen, but it probably will.”This is, “most certainly not what I voted for or intended for when I donated 12.8 bitcoin to Trump's team,” tweeted crypto investor Gary Cardone in response. He went on to explain that while his intentions were to “drain...
